root_summary: Choose between preprocessing tools and reproducibility presets.
tools_summary: Main data preprocessing tools. Select one to configure and run.
presets_summary: Browse reproducibility presets for data preprocessing.

tools.name: Build Trajectories
tools.description: Build longitudinal depressive symptoms trajectories from scratch or from saved model states.
tools.node_summary: Build subject-level trajectory assignments using trajectory modelling techniques.
tools.subtitle: Build trajectories for longitudinal depressive symptoms datasets. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Combine Dataset with Trajectories
tools.description: Merge trajectory assignments with original datasets into a single modelling table.
tools.node_summary: Combine baseline/longitudinal datasets with trajectory labels and optional posterior columns.
tools.subtitle: Combine trajectory assignments with source datasets. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Clean Dataset
tools.description: Clean a dataset with skrub Cleaner and save a new CSV.
tools.node_summary: Apply cleaning passes to improve data quality before downstream modelling.
tools.subtitle: Clean dataset columns and values with configurable cleaning settings. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Missing Imputation
tools.description: Impute missing values with e.g. MICE-based strategy.
tools.node_summary: Run missing-data imputation workflows for numeric and categorical features.
tools.subtitle: Impute missing data using configurable methods. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Harmonise Categories
tools.description: Harmonise noisy categorical labels and write a cleaned CSV.
tools.node_summary: Deduplicate and standardise inconsistent category labels across columns.
tools.subtitle: Harmonise noisy categorical labels. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Show Table
tools.description: Display tabular CSV data with a rich report view.
tools.node_summary: Inspect dataset previews and tabular summaries interactively.
tools.subtitle: Display dataset tabular summaries and previews. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Aggregate Long to Cross Sectional
tools.description: Aggregate repeated subject rows into one-row-per-subject data.
tools.node_summary: Collapse long-format records into cross-sectional features using configurable aggregators.
tools.subtitle: Aggregate long-format data to cross-sectional format. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Remove Columns
tools.description: Drop selected columns from a CSV and write a new CSV.
tools.node_summary: Remove one or more columns from a tabular dataset while validating column names and output safety.
tools.subtitle: Drop selected columns from a CSV dataset with explicit input and output paths. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Rename Feature
tools.description: Rename one feature in a CSV dataset and write a new output file.
tools.node_summary: Apply controlled feature renaming with validation against missing/duplicate names.
tools.subtitle: Rename one feature in a CSV dataset. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Pivot Long to Wide
tools.description: Pivot long-format longitudinal tabular data into wide format.
tools.node_summary: Create wide longitudinal tables with configurable id/time/value feature handling.
tools.subtitle: Pivot long-format longitudinal data to wide format. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Trajectories Viz
tools.description: Create trajectory visualisations with selectable visualiser types.
tools.node_summary: Build class spaghetti, mean profile, and trajectory-size visualisations.
tools.subtitle: Create trajectory visualisations for longitudinal outcomes. Press Esc to exit.

presets.name: Preprocess MCS by LEAP
presets.description: Run the staged, config-driven preprocessing preset for the prepared MCS wide dataset, with transparent per-stage audit outputs.
